section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports pain in the left hand.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom rather than an exam or objective finding, so it belongs in the history rather than the findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient put a cold pack on the knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes patient self-care prior to or during the visit, which is more consistent with history; its placement in findings is not seriously misleading but is organizationally suboptimal.
